chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2627 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For katcha peshi. 07-02-2018 Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto A.A.G. Sindh. This is second call, none present for petitioner. No intimation received. It is now 11.20 a.m. Since none present on behalf of the petitioner, therefore, we ourselves have gone through the prayer clauses of the petition, in which petitioner is, inter alia, seeking protection of his life and property and not to cause him harassment. Learned A.A.G. submits that the official respondents would act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the life and property to the petitioner in the event if petitioner approaches to them. In view of the above, this constitutional petition stands disposed of with direction to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. Office is directed to supply the copy of this order to the learned A.A.G. for compliance. Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
